div.head:
No. 964
Editorial Note
div.p: On February 21 and February 25, the Foreign Minister of Egypt and Ambassador Caffery signed and exchanged notes concerning the Technical Cooperation Agreement of May 5, 1951, which had entered into force on August 15, 1951. For the texts of these notes and the text of the agreement, see TIAS No. 2479, printed in 3 UST (pt. 2. 2960.
